caption:
Capricorns, your dreams are manifesting RIGHT NOW, but a hidden fear is holding you back!

You've been waiting for what feels like an eternity, but trust me, it's on its way!
The universe is sending you a powerful sign: 1111 is appearing everywhere, confirming your desires are manifesting.
But, there's one crucial belief holding you back: the fear of not being 'good enough'.
This fear is causing you to self-sabotage, delaying your progress.

Your lucky manifestation code is 333, a sign that your desires are already in motion!

Lucky number: 3
Lucky color: Gold
Today's vibe: CONFIDENCE

Perform the 'Release & Renewal' ritual: write down what you want to let go of, burn the paper, and visualize yourself already in possession of what you desire.

Music provided by sonican (https://pixabay.com/users/sonican-38947841/)

#capricorn #astrology #horoscope #manifestation

script.hook: Capricorns, your dreams are manifesting RIGHT NOW, but a hidden fear is holding you back!
body: You've been waiting for what feels like an eternity, but trust me, it's on its way!
The universe is sending you a powerful sign: 1111 is appearing everywhere, confirming your desires are manifesting.
But, there's one crucial belief holding you back: the fear of not being 'good enough'.
This fear is causing you to self-sabotage, delaying your progress.
It's time to let go of this mindset and trust that you're already worthy of your desires.
script.reveal: Your lucky manifestation code is 333, a sign that your desires are already in motion!
script.cta: Perform the 'Release & Renewal' ritual: write down what you want to let go of, burn the paper, and visualize yourself already in possession of what you desire.
script.ritual: Write down what you want to release, burn the paper, and visualize yourself already in possession of what you desire.
